name: Chocolate Kiss Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Chopped Nuts (Pecans, Walnuts, or Almonds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon; set aside.
3. Beat butter and sugars until light.
4. Beat in eggs, vanilla, and almond extract.
5. Blend in flour mixture.
6. Chop 1 cup of Chocolate Kisses.
7. Stir in chopped kisses and chopped nuts.
8. Add 1 cup whole Chocolate Kisses.
9. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto an ungreased baking sheet, about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake in hot oven for 8 to 10 minutes.
11. Cool on wire rack.
